case_title: SELLICK, BRENT VS HUMPHREY, LOIS E.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 721509 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENT AS TO DEFENDANT HUMPHREY, LOIS E.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. SMALL CLAIMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
